Tests that an object created from null has the type 'object'.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the creation of an object in JavaScript. It initializes a variable `a` and assigns it the result of `Object(null)`, which creates an empty object. The script then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the type of `a` is `'object'`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on the behavior of the `Object` constructor when given `null` as an argument.
